goals.title: Write the final plan for Tomato Farm input UX, then implement the app...
goals.objective: Write the final plan for Tomato Farm input UX, then implement the approved end-to-end improvements for gym exercise entry, meal entry, and running/cardio entry. Preserve vanilla JavaScript, TDS Mobile/Seed style, Firestore save safety, service-worker cache rules, and production Pages verification. Scope excludes barcode scanner, music integration, shoe tagging, social challenges, and long-form running plans.

successCriteria.scenario: Input UX happy path: final plan/design docs exist; workout activity tabs/forms, standalone manual cardio, and meal quick-add sheet are wired.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/input-ux-commercial-completion/red-green-tests.txt plus passing targeted input UX tests.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Post gate-blocker targeted verification: node --check tests/input-ux-commercial-completion.test.js && node --check tests/diet-add-button-binding.test.js && node --test tests/running-entry.test.js tests/diet-add-button-binding.test.js tests/input-ux-commercial-completion.test.js => exit 0; behavioralized targeted input UX 19 tests; 19 pass; 0 fail. Evidence: .omo/evidence/input-ux-commercial-completion/red-green-tests.txt

successCriteria.scenario: Save/schema/regression path: meal photo fields, workout draft safety, running calculations, service worker assets, and the full Node suite remain green.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/input-ux-commercial-completion/regression-tests.txt plus passing full Node test suite.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Post gate-blocker regression verification: node scripts/verify-runtime-assets.mjs => exit 0 refs=879; node --test tests/*.test.js => exit 0; 693 tests; 693 pass; 0 fail; git diff --check => exit 0. Evidence: .omo/evidence/input-ux-commercial-completion/regression-tests.txt

successCriteria.scenario: Real surface path: production Pages serves the expected commit/cache marker and browser QA observes the new workout/activity and meal quick-add surfaces.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Production browser QA rerun after gate blocker: .omo/evidence/input-ux-commercial-completion/browser-qa/browser-qa-report.json => HTTP 200; verdict passed; unclassifiedConsoleIssues=[]; pageErrors=[]; AppCheck 403 URL redacted and classified as known Firebase AppCheck pre-auth noise; cfState active/open/wod/duration/timerStarted=false; cardioState active/standalone/speed/minutes/hasSave; mealState breakfast actions search/direct/photo-ai/photo-attach/skip. cleanup: removed QA-only sheets and closed Playwright page/context/browser; no localhost dev server started.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
